creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 233704
Mark DEPRECATED

According to the upstream document https://www.oracle.com/us/support/library/lifetime-support-technology-069183.pdf MySQL 5.5 has reached it's Extended Support on December 2018. Under sustaining support there is no New updates, fixes, security alerts, data fixes, and critical patch updates. Hence we should deprecate and expire before 2022Q3.
